$description: Machine-readable enumeration of every token emitted by the token-build. Consumed by the lint guardrails (#234) so styling and linting share one source of truth.

descriptions.--font-family-base: Brand UI base font (brand → token map §2): Inter — all portal UI, body + headings. Inter is web-available + the shadcn default → no fallback risk. The portal loads Inter via next/font and binds it to --font-sans, so utilities resolve to Inter.
descriptions.--font-family-sans: Alias of font.family.base — the Tailwind `font-sans` utility / body default resolves to the brand base font (Inter).
descriptions.--font-family-display: RESERVED — Tactic Sans Extended (brand: special/marketing surfaces). Licensed brand face; NOT loaded by core UI. Token only.
descriptions.--font-family-brand: RESERVED — Century Gothic (brand: project logos/lockups). Licensed brand face; NOT loaded by core UI. Token only.
descriptions.--font-family-social: RESERVED — Montserrat (brand: social-media assets). NOT loaded by core UI. Token only.
descriptions.--color-background: The default page/app surface (neo-brutalist page = flat white). Pair with `foreground` for text.
descriptions.--color-foreground: Ink — the default text and icon colour, used on `background`.
descriptions.--color-section: A faintly-tinted block surface used to band a section apart from the flat page, without a card border.
descriptions.--color-card: A raised surface (card, popover, panel) sitting on `background`, framed by the hard `border`. Pair with `card-foreground`.
descriptions.--color-card-foreground: Text and icon colour on a `card` surface.
descriptions.--color-primary: Brand anchor (blue.500) for link accents, focus, icons and tints. NOT a normal-weight filled action — that fails AA; use `primary-action`.
descriptions.--color-primary-foreground: Text and icon colour ON a primary/action fill (white on the brand button).
descriptions.--color-primary-action: Resting fill for a normal-weight filled primary button (blue.700 = #114D9E, white 8.14:1). Pairs with `primary-foreground`. Also the AA link-text colour.
descriptions.--color-primary-hover: Hover fill for a primary action (darker than the resting `primary-action`).
descriptions.--color-primary-pressed: Pressed/active fill for a primary action.
descriptions.--color-primary-surface: Brand-coloured panel/surface that carries normal-weight white copy (e.g. the auth brand panel).
descriptions.--color-secondary: Low-emphasis tonal fill (secondary buttons, subtle chips). Pair with `secondary-foreground`.
descriptions.--color-secondary-foreground: Text and icon colour on a `secondary` fill.
descriptions.--color-muted: A muted background for subtle fills, hovered rows or disabled tracks.
descriptions.--color-muted-foreground: De-emphasised text — helper text, placeholders, captions, metadata (neutral.600).
descriptions.--color-faint: Third text tier below `muted-foreground` — timestamps, tertiary metadata (neutral.500).
descriptions.--color-muted-2: Faintest text tier — disabled labels, decorative captions (neutral.400). Non-body use only; below the AA body-text threshold by design.
descriptions.--color-accent: Hover/selected background for interactive list items and ghost buttons. Pair with `accent-foreground`.
descriptions.--color-accent-foreground: Text and icon colour on an `accent` surface.
descriptions.--color-tint: Pale-blue informational surface (tint chips, callouts). Pair with `tint-foreground`.
descriptions.--color-tint-foreground: Text and icon colour on a `tint` surface (blue.700 on blue.100, 6.49:1 AA).
descriptions.--color-header: Brand chrome band (top nav / app header) — the brand-forward blue.500. Pair with `header-foreground`; header text is large/bold brand or logo (white on blue.500 is 3.69:1, the large/bold ≥3:1 carve-out, not normal-weight body — see AA note in ADR-0013 §7).
descriptions.--color-header-foreground: Text, logo and icon colour on the `header` band (white).
descriptions.--color-success: Positive-status fill, border or icon. Pair with `success-foreground` (white is large/bold on green.500 = 3.68:1).
descriptions.--color-success-foreground: Text and icon colour on a `success` fill.
descriptions.--color-warning: Caution-status fill, border or icon (functional amber). Pair with `warning-foreground` — white FAILS AA on amber, so the foreground is dark ink.
descriptions.--color-warning-foreground: Dark ink on a `warning` amber fill (neutral.950, 5.14:1 on amber.500 / 8.99:1 on amber.400 dark).
descriptions.--color-destructive: Error/danger/live fill, border or icon — destructive actions, invalid state, live indicators. Pair with `destructive-foreground`.
descriptions.--color-destructive-foreground: Text and icon colour on a `destructive` fill.
descriptions.--color-border: Structural border — the hard near-black outline (neutral.900) of the neo-brutalist frame (2px). Not the subtle divider; that is `hairline`.
descriptions.--color-hairline: Subtle 1px divider/rule between rows and list items, where a hard structural `border` would be too heavy.
descriptions.--color-input: Border colour of form inputs and controls — the same hard structural outline as `border`.
descriptions.--color-ring: The keyboard-focus ring colour (blue.300); the `focus` shadow (`shadow.focus`) is blue.300 @ 50%.
descriptions.--color-elevation: Primary cast-shadow tone for the hard offset shadows (`shadow.md`/`lg`). Theme-aware: blue.700 light → blue.300 dark.
descriptions.--color-elevation-soft: Softer cast-shadow tone for the small offset shadows (`shadow.sm`/`base`). Theme-aware: blue.200 light → blue.600 dark.
descriptions.--space-inset-sm: Compact inset — padding inside a dense card, chip or control (16px).
descriptions.--space-inset-md: Default inset — the standard padding inside a card or panel (20px).
descriptions.--space-inset-lg: Roomy inset — padding inside a spacious panel or dialog (24px).
descriptions.--space-inset-xl: Hero inset — padding inside a feature/hero surface (30px).
descriptions.--space-stack: Stack gap — vertical space between stacked list cards. 28px on desktop; collapses to 0 on mobile (edge-to-edge list), applied via the `desktop:` boundary.
descriptions.--space-section-sm: Section rhythm (min) — vertical space between page blocks/sections (44px).
descriptions.--space-section-lg: Section rhythm (max) — the larger block-to-block gap for a more open page (48px).
descriptions.--space-control-sm: Tight control gap — space between adjacent chips/buttons/fields (8px).
descriptions.--space-control-md: Default control gap — the standard gap in a control row (10px).
descriptions.--space-control-lg: Roomy control gap — a more separated control row (12px).
descriptions.--space-inline-sm: Tight inline gap — icon↔text spacing in a dense label (6px).
descriptions.--space-inline-md: Default inline gap — icon↔text spacing in a button/chip (8px).
descriptions.--space-band: Day-band bleed — zero inset; a band that runs full-bleed to the container edge (0).
descriptions.--layout-gutter: Desktop page gutter — fluid, clamping between 16px and 48px as the viewport grows. Paired with a container max-width + `margin-inline:auto`.
descriptions.--layout-gutter-mobile: Mobile page gutter — a fixed 16px inset on the edge-to-edge shell (below the `desktop` breakpoint).
